title: clinopodium depauperatum
intro: Clinopodium depauperatum, also known as dwarf calamint or narrowleaf calamint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium depauperatum include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
